answer:
\boxed{Darth Vader}

Obi-Wan Kenobi duels Darth Vader in the Death Star’s hangar bay after disabling the tractor beam. The fight occurs just before Obi-Wan sacrifices himself to allow Luke, Leia, Han, and Chewbacca to escape. Vader ultimately kills Obi-Wan, but his spirit later guides Luke to destroy the Death Star.
